title: Ouverture / Let's Hang Out
notes: DCA original. Score: overture-inmymind.musicxml (MusicXML 4.0, Dorico 6, 2026-04-18). Follows In My Mind. Parts: Baritone (David), Electric Guitar, Grand staff (keys), Bass Guitar. Tempo: 52 BPM for verse/chorus, 60 BPM for Am riff section.

perform.guitar: E7 chord (E-G#-D voicing). Single-note riff F#5 through measures.
perform.all: Verse 1: 'Let's hang out for a bit and we'll tell you some shit that goes on in our minds'

perform.bass: Move: A2 → F#2 → E2, following phrase
perform.all: 'We can't quite comprehend that our era may end / is it ending, is it already gone?'

perform.bass: A2 — lock in with the riff
perform.guitar: Am blues riff — A/G/Bb pentatonic (score M64-71)
perform.all: Riff section — instrumental. Tempo up to 60.
'What's the best way to fight for what I think and feel is right without doing wrong?'
Follow David to the end. See score M80-82.
